definitions: 饮料；饮品（尤指除水以外、可购买或特定类型的饮品）

examples.text: As the yeasts feed on the fruit sugars, they produce a compound called ethanol—the type of alcohol in alcoholic beverages.
examples.explanation: 这里的 beverages 指“饮料”。alcoholic beverages 就是“含酒精饮料”。

source.text: A brief history of alcohol - Rod Phillips

examples.text: Ancient fermented beverages had relatively low alcohol content.
examples.explanation: 这里的 fermented beverages 指“发酵饮料”，例如古代通过发酵制成的酒类饮品。

source.text: A brief history of alcohol - Rod Phillips
